message:
content: Update location and add 28 new projects/articles with star counts

Major content refresh with location update, 4 new GitHub articles,
24 new open-source projects, and comprehensive star count badges.

Location update:
- Changed from "Brooklyn, New York" to "Westchester, New York"

New writing articles (4):
1. Hoeffding's D: A Statistical Measure Explained (100 stars)
   - Educational guide comparing statistical measures
   - Category: Statistics
2. Lamport's Bakery Algorithm for Concurrent Locking (95 stars)
   - Classic concurrency algorithm in Python
   - Category: Algorithms
3. LLM Introspective Compression and Metacognition (26 stars)
   - Novel approach to transformer state compression
   - Category: AI Research
4. Multi-Round LLM Coding Tournament (9 stars)
   - Competitive framework for LLM code improvement
   - Category: AI Research

New open-source projects (24):
High-impact projects (500+ stars):
- LLM-Aided OCR: 2.8K stars - Tesseract OCR enhancement with LLMs
- Swiss Army Llama: 1K stars - FastAPI semantic search service
- MCP Agent Mail: 756 stars - Coordination layer for coding agents
- Your Source to Prompt: 679 stars - Offline LLM prompt builder
- Bulk YouTube Transcriber: 611 stars - Whisper-based transcription
- Claude Code Agent Farm: 574 stars - Multi-agent orchestration

Medium-impact projects (100-500 stars):
- Automatic Log Collector: 411 stars - Remote log aggregation
- Fast Vector Similarity: 408 stars - Rust-based similarity computation
- SQLAlchemy Visualizer: 281 stars - Database schema to SVG
- Visual A* Pathfinding: 177 stars - Algorithm visualization
- Ultimate MCP Client: 139 stars - Async MCP client with dual UI
- Mindmap Generator: 127 stars - LLM-powered document mindmaps

Specialized projects (20-99 stars):
- Next.js GitHub Markdown Blog: 81 stars
- Kissinger Thesis Reader: 45 stars
- Ultimate Bug Scanner: 28 stars
- LLM Tournament: 25 stars
- Anti-Alzheimer's Flasher: 22 stars
- GitHub Repo Stars Analyzer: 17 stars
- PPP Loan Fraud Analysis: 13 stars
- LLM Docs: 11 stars
- ACIP (Prompt Injection Defense): 7 stars
- Multivariate Normality Testing: 3 stars
- Letter Learning Game: Educational
- Jazz Chord Progression Editor: Music tool

Star count additions to existing projects:
- MCP Agent Mail: Added 756 stars badge (was "HTTP-only MCP server")
- Ultimate Bug Scanner: Added 28 stars badge
- LLM Docs: Added 11 stars badge
- Kissinger Thesis Reader: Added 45 stars badge

Project sorting:
- Sorted by star count (descending) with recency weighting
- MCP Agent Mail correctly positioned at #3 (756 stars)
- Top project: LLM-Aided OCR (2.8K stars)
- Total portfolio: 31 OSS projects (up from 6)

Tag enhancements:
- Added more descriptive tags (5 per project)
- Improved searchability and categorization
- Better technology stack visibility

Impact:
- Showcases breadth of open-source contributions
- Demonstrates impact with star counts
- Highlights recent high-growth projects (MCP Agent Mail)
- Total stars across portfolio: 8,000+
- Shows expertise across AI, infrastructure, and tooling

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
